name: agent-bridge-alexa-bridge
description: Amazon Alexa / Echo → agent-bridge bridge. Speak a freeform task to an Echo; a thin Alexa custom skill POSTs it to this receiver, which FIRE-AND-FORGET injects the task into the local machine's running Claude Code session via agent-bridge sendLocalMessage(), then returns a fast spoken ack. When the agent finishes it speaks the result back to the Echo via alexa_remote_control.sh (with a Telegram fallback).
author: EthanSK
